features: Light gel cream helps hydrate, smooth lines and reduce under-eye puffiness
Firming Peptides, Vitamin C + Vitamin E
description: Product Description Level up your skincare routine with our Step 3 Peptide Firming Eye Gel. The skin surrounding your eyes is much thinner than the rest of your face, so a dedicated eye cream is important for maximum absorption. Our light gel cream should be used twice daily to effectively smooth fine lines and awaken your tired eyes. Firming Peptides, Apple, Plum, Vitamin C and Vitamin E all work to gently boost hydration whilst firming and reducing the appearance of under-eye puffiness. Vegan Friendly. Ingredients Water (Aqua), Butylene Glycol, Dimethicone, Isononyl Isononanoate, Betaine, 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, Tocopheryl Acetate, Hydrolyzed Prunus Domestica (Plum), Sodium Hyaluronate, Pyrus Malus (Apple) Fiber, Allantoin, Elastin, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Lavandula Hybrida (Lavender) Oil, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis (Orange) Peel Oil, Hydroxyethyl Acrylate/Sodium Acryloyldimethyl Taurate Copolymer, Ammonium Acryloyldimethyltaurate/VP Copolymer, Hydroxyacetophenone, 1,2-Hexanediol, Polysorbate 60, Sorbitan Isostearate, Hydroxyproline, Dipeptide Diaminobutyroyl Benzylamide Diacetate, T-Butyl Alcohol, Linalool, Limonene. Directions Includes user manual or instruction manual See more
